description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the microsoft/dotnet:latest Docker image. Add a build job that runs the commands `dotnet --version`, `dotnet restore --verbosity normal`, and `dotnet build --verbosity normal`. Add a test job that changes into the XUnitTestProject1 directory and runs `dotnet restore --verbosity normal` followed by `dotnet test --verbosity normal`. Both jobs run in the default test stage, have no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
